faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.teamResponds: Our team responds within minutes via email. Ask us anything!
faq.whatsappText: Hi! I have a question about your tours.

items.question: Is hotel pickup included?
items.answer: Yes! Most tours include free hotel pickup and drop-off from Phuket (Patong, Kata, Karon, Rawai, Kamala, Bangtao, Surin, Phuket Town). Krabi and Samui tours pick up from hotels in those areas. Check each tour for details.

items.question: What is the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the tour. Full refund, no questions asked. Cancel up to 3 PM the day before for most tours.

items.question: Are tours safe for children?
items.answer: Most island tours are suitable for children aged 4+. Life jackets are provided in all sizes. Children under 4 are typically free, ages 4-11 get 50% off. Some activities like scuba diving and zipline have age/height restrictions listed on each tour page.

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: Sunscreen (reef-safe preferred), swimwear, towel, sunglasses, waterproof phone case, and cash for national park fees (some tours don't include them). Snorkel gear, lunch, and drinks are provided on all tours.

items.question: When is the best time to visit?
items.answer: November to April is peak season with calm seas and clear skies. Similan Islands are only open Oct-May. Maya Bay closes Aug-Sep. June to September is monsoon season — cheaper prices but rougher seas and some tours may be cancelled.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, and bank transfers. Pay a small deposit to secure your booking, and the rest on the day of the tour.

items.question: Do you offer tours outside Phuket?
items.answer: Yes! We cover all of southern Thailand — Krabi, Koh Samui, Khao Sok National Park, Khao Lak, Koh Lanta, and Phang Nga. Many tours include transfers from Phuket.

items.question: Can you arrange custom tours?
items.answer: Absolutely! Contact us via WhatsApp for custom itineraries, private tours, multi-day packages, or anything not listed. We can arrange almost anything in southern Thailand.
